content.overview: You are the spark that starts the fire. Being an Aries means living life at 100 mph, fueled by a natural competitive streak and an honest, 'what you see is what you get' personality. You don’t just walk into a room; you arrive with a mission. While others hesitate, you’ve already taken the first three steps toward the goal, making you the ultimate pioneer of the zodiac.
content.fun_fact: Aries is ruled by Mars, the planet of action and energy, which is why Aries is always so passionate and fiercely independent.
content.emotional_tendency: Aries feels emotions intensely and expresses them immediately. They are quick to anger but also quick to forgive and forget.
content.compatibility_notes: In love, Aries is passionate and direct. They often match well with Leo and Sagittarius because they share the same fiery energy.
content.general_advice: Patience is a virtue. Your speed and drive are strengths, but taking a moment to breathe before acting can save you from trouble.
content.hidden_talent: You may have a hidden talent for entrepreneurship, competitive sports, or inspiring others to take bold leaps.

content.overview: You are the anchor in a chaotic world. Being a Taurus means appreciating the finer things in life—the scent of rain, a perfectly cooked meal, or the feel of high-quality fabric. You move at your own pace, refusing to be rushed by a world that is always in a hurry. Once you’ve made up your mind, you are immovable, providing a sense of security and reliability that everyone around you relies on.
content.fun_fact: Taurus is ruled by Venus, the planet of beauty and love, which is why Taurus has a strong appreciation for art and beautiful surroundings.
content.emotional_tendency: Taurus usually hides emotions at first and prefers to feel safe before opening up. They are steady but can become overly attached.
content.compatibility_notes: Taurus often matches well with Virgo and Capricorn because they share similar values such as stability and trust.
content.general_advice: Do not be afraid of change. Your stability is your strength, but growth comes from stepping outside your comfort zone.
content.hidden_talent: You may have a hidden talent for interior design, cooking, music, fashion, or gardening.

content.overview: You are a kaleidoscope of ideas and interests. Being a Gemini means having a 'dual' nature that allows you to see both sides of every story, making you an incredible communicator and a social chameleon. Your mind moves faster than most people can talk, and your curiosity is a bottomless pit that keeps you perpetually young at heart, always searching for the next 'why.'
content.fun_fact: Gemini is ruled by Mercury, the planet of communication, which is why Geminis are so witty and expressive.
content.emotional_tendency: Gemini processes emotions through logic and talk. They might seem detached at times, but they are just trying to understand their feelings intellectually.
content.compatibility_notes: Gemini thrives with Libra and Aquarius. They need partners who can keep up with their fast-paced minds and love for variety.
content.general_advice: Focus is your friend. You have many interests, but finishing one thing before starting another will lead to greater success.
content.hidden_talent: You may have a hidden talent for podcasting, writing, public speaking, or picking up new languages incredibly fast.

content.overview: You are the emotional heartbeat of the zodiac. Being a Cancer means having a memory like an attic—filled with sentimental treasures and a deep connection to your roots. You have an incredible 'mothering' energy that makes your home a sanctuary for anyone lucky enough to be in your inner circle. Your intuition is your compass, guiding you through life's tides.
content.fun_fact: Cancer is ruled by the Moon, which governs emotions and instincts, making Cancers very sensitive to the moods of others.
content.emotional_tendency: Cancers feel everything very deeply. They have a tough outer shell but are soft and caring on the inside.
content.compatibility_notes: Cancer finds comfort with Scorpio and Pisces. They look for deep emotional connections and long-term security.
content.general_advice: Let people in. Protecting your heart is natural, but vulnerability is where your true strength and connections grow.
content.hidden_talent: You likely have a hidden talent for interior design, caregiving, photography, or even real estate.

content.overview: You carry a natural, sun-like warmth that makes people want to be near you. Being a Leo isn't just about the spotlight; it’s about a deep sense of loyalty and a protective heart that looks out for the 'underdog.' You have a creative flair that turns even the most mundane tasks into a performance, and your generosity often knows no bounds when it comes to the people you love.
content.fun_fact: Leo is ruled by the Sun, the center of our solar system, which explains why Leos have such a radiant and magnetic personality.
content.emotional_tendency: Leos are expressive and passionate. When they love, they love loudly, but they can be hurt if their efforts aren't appreciated.
content.compatibility_notes: Leo matches perfectly with Aries and Sagittarius. They appreciate people who are as confident and adventurous as they are.
content.general_advice: True confidence doesn't always need an audience. Your inner light shines even when no one is watching.
content.hidden_talent: You likely have a hidden talent for acting, leadership, event planning, or creative direction.

content.overview: Your mind is a finely-tuned instrument that notices the beauty in precision. Being a Virgo means seeing the world in high-definition; where others see a mess, you see a system waiting to be optimized. You show your love through quiet acts of service—fixing a problem before anyone else realizes it exists or offering the exact piece of advice someone needs to hear.
content.fun_fact: Virgo is ruled by Mercury, the planet of communication and intellect, which gives Virgo strong analytical skills.
content.emotional_tendency: Virgo tends to think deeply about feelings instead of showing them openly. They show love through actions and support.
content.compatibility_notes: Virgo connects well with Taurus and Capricorn because these signs value loyalty, effort, and emotional security.
content.general_advice: Do not be too hard on yourself. You do not need to be perfect to be worthy. Let yourself rest and make mistakes.
content.hidden_talent: You may have a hidden talent for analysis, writing, editing, planning, coding, or teaching.

content.overview: You are the bridge-builder, constantly seeking the perfect middle ground. Being a Libra means having a refined eye for aesthetics and a soul that craves harmony above all else. You are a natural diplomat who can navigate complex social waters with grace, making everyone feel heard and valued. For you, life is most beautiful when it is shared and perfectly balanced.
content.fun_fact: Libra is the only sign represented by an inanimate object—the scales—symbolizing their constant quest for balance and justice.
content.emotional_tendency: Libras try to keep their emotions balanced. They may avoid bringing up problems to keep the peace, but they value fairness above all.
content.compatibility_notes: Libra connects well with Gemini and Aquarius. They love intellectual conversations and social outings.
content.general_advice: It’s okay to pick a side. Making a decision is better than staying in the middle and feeling stuck.
content.hidden_talent: You likely have a hidden talent for law, fashion, graphic design, or mediation.

content.overview: You are a person of profound depth and unshakeable focus. Being a Scorpio means experiencing life with an intensity that others might find intimidating, but it’s simply because you refuse to live on the surface. You value radical honesty and absolute loyalty; once someone has earned your trust, you will walk through fire for them, but you never forget a betrayal.
content.fun_fact: Scorpio is ruled by Pluto, the planet of transformation and rebirth, which is why Scorpios are so resilient and good at reinventing themselves.
content.emotional_tendency: Scorpio's emotions are like an ocean—quiet on the surface but incredibly deep and powerful underneath.
content.compatibility_notes: Scorpio aligns with Cancer and Pisces. They crave honesty, intensity, and deep emotional loyalty.
content.general_advice: Trust is earned, but don't let suspicion keep you lonely. Letting people in can lead to the transformation you crave.
content.hidden_talent: You likely have a hidden talent for psychology, investigation, strategy, or financial management.

content.overview: You are a lifelong student of the world, driven by an insatiable hunger for truth and new horizons. For you, life is a grand adventure that shouldn't be wasted on a routine. You possess a 'wild-child' spirit and a blunt honesty that is refreshing, if sometimes startling. Your optimism is your greatest weapon, allowing you to find the silver lining in every storm.
content.fun_fact: Sagittarius is ruled by Jupiter, the planet of luck and expansion, which is why they always seem to land on their feet.
content.emotional_tendency: Sagittarius is very open with their feelings. They don't like to feel 'trapped' by heavy emotions and prefer to move forward quickly.
content.compatibility_notes: Sagittarius loves the energy of Aries and Leo. They need a partner who wants to explore the world with them.
content.general_advice: Details matter too. Your big-picture thinking is amazing, but don't forget the small steps needed to get there.
content.hidden_talent: You likely have a hidden talent for philosophy, travel writing, coaching, or teaching.

content.overview: You are the architect of the zodiac, always thinking ten steps ahead. Being a Capricorn means understanding that anything worth having requires a solid foundation and a lot of hard work. You have a dry, witty sense of humor that only those close to you truly see, and a stoic resilience that allows you to climb the steepest mountains without ever complaining about the cold.
content.fun_fact: Capricorn is ruled by Saturn, the planet of structure and discipline, which is why they appear wise and determined.
content.emotional_tendency: Capricorn may not express feelings quickly and prefers control. Once they trust someone, they are extremely loyal.
content.compatibility_notes: Capricorn matches well with Taurus and Virgo because these signs understand patience and building a stable future.
content.general_advice: Do not carry every burden alone. Strength is also about allowing yourself to rest and trust others.
content.hidden_talent: You may have a hidden talent for leadership, business management, strategy, and long-term planning.

content.overview: You are the visionary who lives five minutes in the future. Being an Aquarius means feeling a bit like an outsider, but using that perspective to challenge the status quo and dream of a better world for everyone. You value intellectual freedom and deep, meaningful friendships over shallow social rules, and your 'eccentric' ideas are often the very things that lead to true innovation.
content.fun_fact: Despite the name, Aquarius is an Air sign, not a Water sign. They are thinkers and innovators who 'pour' knowledge into the world.
content.emotional_tendency: Aquarius can seem aloof, but they actually care about humanity as a whole. They prefer logic over messy emotional displays.
content.compatibility_notes: Aquarius matches well with Gemini and Libra. They value friendship, intellectual freedom, and independence in a relationship.
content.general_advice: Connection is a strength. Your independence is great, but don't forget that personal bonds are just as important as global ideas.
content.hidden_talent: You likely have a hidden talent for coding, social activism, inventing, or trend-spotting.

content.overview: You are the dreamer who blurs the lines between reality and imagination. Being a Pisces means possessing a 'psychic' level of empathy that allows you to feel what others are feeling before they even speak. You are a natural healer and artist, often finding solace in music, poetry, or the ocean. Your gentle nature is a rare gift in a harsh world, reminding everyone to lead with kindness.
content.fun_fact: Pisces is ruled by Neptune, the planet of dreams and illusions, which gives them their incredible creativity and psychic-like intuition.
content.emotional_tendency: Pisces is an emotional sponge. They feel the energy of the room and are very sensitive to how others treat them.
content.compatibility_notes: Pisces finds harmony with Cancer and Scorpio. they need a partner who respects their sensitivity and shares their romantic view of life.
content.general_advice: Boundaries are healthy. You give so much to others—make sure you save some of that magic for yourself.
content.hidden_talent: You likely have a hidden talent for music, visual arts, healing, or creative writing.
